defaults.ptx_feature: PTX ISA 8.7 minimum; CUDA 13.3 emits PTX 9.3

stages.detail: libNVVM recognized the typed form but merged two identical calls into one; the selected convergent inline route retained both.

stages.representation: convergent dense kind::f8f6f4 F32 inline PTX
stages.detail: libNVVM emitted 10560-byte PTX (SHA-256 fd7f653c260b48292a2d6ff8b3654724e86a5ef6cba27d89ef1af0d7dd06b65f) and 12096-byte LTOIR (SHA-256 cf491e7bc314c99993da01f489a35b897ea35320b722e9cb1c7776b0993ea5c0) with exactly 25 unique forms.

ptxas produced a 11760-byte cubin (SHA-256 91b1db2dc0f4505badc8dc216f4d766f883046f2b51877846cdb4f304d291689); its 32140-byte SASS dump (SHA-256 3943ff27ac8050cca484e822fd0605e465768a53c60c18e70ad5e150c63c6760) contains exactly 25 unique QMMA forms.
